startPoint.en: Talk to the monk just outside Paterdomus (the temple on the Salve).
startPoint.es: Habla con el monje justo a las afueras de Paterdomus (el templo del Salve).

items.name: Mithril 2h sword
items.display: Mithril 2h sword (Mithril 2h sword +1, +2 variants will not work)

items.name: Large pouch
items.display: A large pouch (must not be fully degraded, will be lost during the quest)

recommended.name: Invitation box
recommended.display: An invitation box for quick teleports to the monk (requires completion of the Missing, Presumed Death quest) or activated Fort Forinthry lodestone (requires completion of New Foundations quest)

recommended.name: Law altar teleport
recommended.display: A law altar teleport for easy access to Entrana, or access to the Abyss

recommended.name: Runecrafting
recommended.display: 25,000 coins, and 50 Runecrafting for Runecrafting Guild access, if you wish to buy a large pouch instead of getting it from monster drops

text.en: Talk to the monk just outside of Paterdomus which is east of Silvarea.
text.es: Habla con el monje justo a las afueras de Paterdomus, al este de Silvarea.

text.en: Bowstring and mithril 2h sword
Head to Doric's hut north of the Falador lodestone and use a mithril 2h sword on the whetstone outside of the hut.
text.es: Dirígete a la cabaña de Doric al norte de la piedra de viaje de Falador y usa una espada a dos manos de mithril en la piedra de afilar que hay fuera de la cabaña.

text.en: Use a bowstring on the slender blade.
text.es: Usa una cuerda de arco en la espada delgada.

text.en: Return to the monk.

chatOptions: 1 Yep, got it right here for you.

text.en: Large pouch
Use the orb on a large pouch.
text.es: Usa el orbe en un saco grande.

text.en: Bank everything that you are not allowed to take to Entrana, and ensure you keep the large pouch in your inventory.
text.es: Deposita en el banco todo lo que no puedas llevar a Entrana, y asegúrate de mantener el saco grande en tu inventario.

highlightTerms: not allowed to take to Entrana

text.en: Reach Entrana either through the Abyss or by using a law altar teleport.
text.es: Llega a Entrana ya sea a través del Abyss o usando un teletransporte del altar de leyes.

text.en: If entering through the Abyss, enter the Abyss via the Mage of Zamorak north of Edgeville, then make your way to the law rift. Dismiss any summoning familiar. Leave the Law Rune Temple by using the portal.
text.es: Si entras a través del Abyss, accede al Abyss mediante el Mage of Zamorak al norte de Edgeville, y luego dirígete a la grieta de leyes. Descarta cualquier familiar de invocación. Sal del Law Rune Temple usando el portal.

text.en: Head into the church of Entrana to the south.
text.es: Dirígete a la iglesia de Entrana, al sur.

text.en: Use the pouch on the prayer altar. Doing this will cause you to lose your large pouch.
text.es: Usa el saco en el altar de oración. Al hacer esto perderás tu saco grande.

text.en: Watch the cutscene.
Talk to the High Priest if you didn't during the cutscene.
text.es: Habla con el High Priest si no lo hiciste durante la escena cinemática.

text.en: Entrana access (or law altar teleport)
Return to the monk, back outside Paterdomus.
text.es: Vuelve con el monje, de nuevo a las afueras de Paterdomus.

text.en: Search the Dead Monk.
Talk to the High Priest back on Entrana.
text.es: Habla con el High Priest de vuelta en Entrana.

text.en: Talk to Sir Tiffy Cashien in Falador Park.<!-- Selecting Devious Minds is not needed anymore, you can just spacebar through the text, it will complete the quest -->
text.es: Habla con Sir Tiffy Cashien en Falador Park.<!-- Selecting Devious Minds is not needed anymore, you can just spacebar through the text, it will complete the quest -->

text.en: if The Slug Menace has not yet been started.
text.es: si aún no has comenzado The Slug Menace.

text.en: Quest complete!
